app.configuredError: Supabase is not configured, so demo UI is shown.

categories.title: Choose a category
categories.copy: Browse Uncle Bondq categories and choose what fits your order.

types.title: Choose a product type
types.copy: Only types related to the selected category appear here.
types.empty: No product types found for this category.

sections.title: Choose a section
sections.copy: Sections are filtered by the chosen product type.
sections.empty: No sections found for this type yet.

products.title: {{scope}}
products.copy: Choose a product and add it to cart. Prices are in Syrian pounds.

cart.title: Cart
cart.copy: Adjust quantities or remove products before checkout.
cart.emptyCopy: Add products from the store and they will appear here.

checkout.title: Confirm order
checkout.copy: Enter your phone number and address to send the order.

success.title: Order sent
success.copy: We will save your phone number on this device to show your orders later without login.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.copy: These orders are fetched by phone number only.
orders.adminCopy: Manager view for all orders without filtering.
